title: Trump Loses Ground on Several Personal Traits as Approval Rating Slips
summary_en: A majority of Americans (56%) say the overall level of ethics and honesty in the federal government has fallen over the course of TrumpвАЩs term.

title: Americans remain critical of Trump administrationвАЩs approach to Iran
summary_en: 62% of Americans disapprove of TrumpвАЩs handling of the military action against Iran, and 59% say the U.S. made the wrong decision in using military force.
